ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_reports" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the crime was reported */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time the crime was reported */,
  "major_offense_type" INTEGER /* Type of major offense */,
  "address" TEXT /* Location address of the crime */,
  "neighborhood" INTEGER /* Neighborhood where the crime occurred */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the police precinct */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the police district */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X coordinate for geospatial mapping */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y coordinate for geospatial mapping */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "suspect_description" TEXT /* Description of the suspect, if available */,
  "victim_description" TEXT /* Description of the victim, if applicable */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "incident_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the incident (e.g., arrest made, no action taken) */,
  "reporting_method" TEXT /* Method by which the incident was reported (e.g., phone, online, in person) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the incident */,
  "lighting_conditions" TEXT /* Lighting conditions at the time of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_neighborhood FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_major_offense_type FOREIGN KEY ("major_offense_type") REFERENCES offense_types ("offense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each police precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the police precinct */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the precinct */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the precinct */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the precinct */,
  "website" TEXT /* Web address for the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each police district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the police district */,
  "chief_email" TEXT /* Email of the district police chief */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the district */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the district */,
  "website" TEXT /* Web address for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offense_types" (
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offense type */,
  "offense_name" TEXT /* Name of the offense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offense */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the offense (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  "legal_statute" TEXT /* Relevant legal statute or code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "area" REAL /* Geographical area of the neighborhood in square meters */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Average crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "public_safety_rating" TEXT /* Public safety rating of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime analysis */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime report */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of identified trends or patterns */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_author" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the analysis (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_analysis_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES crime_reports ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officer_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer's report */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporting officer */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident by the officer */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was filed */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time the report was filed */,
  "suspect_arrested" TEXT /* Whether a suspect was arrested (yes/no) */,
  "evidence_collected" TEXT /* Description of evidence collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officer_reports_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES crime_reports ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officer_reports_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct the officer belongs to */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the officer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the officer */,
  "years_of_service" INTEGER /* Number of years the officer has been in service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., Guide, Video) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to access the resource */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the resource was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the resource was last updated */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the resource has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the police district */,
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the offense type */,
  "monthly_count" INTEGER /* Monthly count of offenses */,
  "yearly_count" INTEGER /* Yearly count of offenses */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month for which the statistics are reported */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the statistics are reported */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average response time for incidents in the district */,
  "clearance_rate" REAL /* Clearance rate of offenses in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_offense_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_id") REFERENCES offense_types ("offense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)
